title: CodeGrind AI Assistant Enhancements Bring Smarter Problem Solving
summary: Highlight the latest AI assistant improvements in CodeGrind, including model-switching and a more persistent chat experience to help users solve problems faster.
core_message: CodeGrind's AI assistant now supports multiple model options, persistent conversations, and improved guidance to streamline problem solving within the interactive DSA practice platform.
cta: Explore the updated AI assistant in CodeGrind and try solving a problem with model switching for tailored guidance.
visual_brief: Static UI-focused image showing the CodeGrind problem editor side-by-side with an AI chat panel, highlighting model-switching dropdown and persistent chat UI, cyberpunk-inspired accent colors, clean typography, and subtle code snippets in the background.

media.selection_reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.

reddit_subreddit.title: CodeGrind AI Assistant Upgrades
reddit_subreddit.text: CodeGrind has updated its AI assistant to offer multiple model options, a persistent chat, and improved guidance to help you solve problems faster within the DSA practice platform. The new UI showcases the model switcher and persistent chat in a cyberpunk-inspired editor view. Learn more and try the new AI assist features.
